title: Food
text: Taste is memory. The smell of certain dishes brings back entire moments of my life. This is my food diary.

title: Flower
text: Flowers are the language the earth speaks when words fail. These are my favorites.

title: Perfume
text: Scent is the strongest trigger of emotion. These are the bottles that hold my nostalgia.

title: Time
text: The time of day, the season, the moment — they all hold a different kind of magic. These are my times.
